steps.title: Identify what the question needs
steps.content: The goal is to describe Silver Upper White River to a new audience. The answer must focus on what the work actually is — its medium, form, and completion date — rather than the artist's biography or comparisons to other pieces.

steps.title: Eliminate the choices
steps.content:
• Choice A — 'Completed in 2015, Maya Lin's Silver Upper White River is a large-scale installation artwork composed of recycled silver that fills an entire gallery wall': gives a new audience the date, medium, material, and scale of the specific work — everything needed to understand what it is. ✓
  • Choice B — 'Artist Maya Lin is well known for her installation art, such as Silver Upper White River (2015), and for her memorials': focuses on the artist's reputation rather than describing the work itself; a new audience learns nothing about what Silver Upper White River looks like or how it is made. ✗
  • Choice C — 'Maya Lin's Women's Table is a granite memorial... while Silver Upper White River is an installation artwork': the main focus is on Women's Table, and Silver Upper White River is only labeled — no material, scale, or meaningful description for a new audience. ✗
  • Choice D — 'Though Maya Lin's Silver Upper White River (2015) is not a memorial, its gallery-filling scale may call to mind the imposing Women's Table...': describes Silver Upper White River primarily by contrast with another work; a new audience ends up learning more about Women's Table than about the work in question. ✗
That matches choice A — A is correct.
